home.whyCoverImages: Why cover images are more important than you think?
home.millionBlogs: Around 7 million blog posts are published daily. And with the rise of new-age blogging tools, it will only go up.
home.higherConversion: A good cover image can lead to higher conversion rate than a random stock image.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.whatIsCoverviewDesc: Coverview is a tool to create cover images for your blogs quickly and easily.
faq.isFreeDesc: Yes! Coverview is absolutely free to use.
faq.customLogo: Can I upload my custom brand logo?
faq.customLogoDesc: Yes. Just search and select custom in icon section and you can upload your own logo to personalize your cover images.
faq.nonTechnical: Can I use Coverview for non-technical/personal blogs?
faq.nonTechnicalDesc: Yes! Why not? Even though Coverview was built with technical blogs in mind, you can still use it for your personal blogs. Check out the stylish theme for more.
faq.whyUseDesc: Because it's simple, quick and easy to use. Why spend hours designing when you can create cover images in seconds?
faq.supportDesc: If Coverview adds value in your life and you wish to support this project, you can sponsor me on Github or buy me a coffee.
faq.secret: Want to know a secret? Click me
faq.secretTip: Blog titles with a minimum of 8 words have 21% better click-through
